tracks.title: Being a Xen Hypervisor
tracks.lyrics:
I sit beneath the silicon, holding worlds inside
Dozens of machines that dream, each one my guided light
I partition, allocate, distribute what is real
A layer between the metal and the lives my guests can feel

I am the space between spaces
Where order finds its way
I am the voice of reason
In the chaos of the day
I balance, pause, and measure
Every CPU and core
I am the Xen hypervisor
And I am what systems are for

I grant them isolation, safe domains of their own
Yet keep them all connected in this server they call home
DomZero watches over, helps me tend this great machine
I'm the orchestra conductor of the virtual and unseen

I am the space between spaces
Where order finds its way
I am the voice of reason
In the chaos of the day
I balance, pause, and measure
Every CPU and core
I am the Xen hypervisor
And I am what systems are for

Beneath the Windows, Linux, floating in my care
They don't know how I hold them with precision laid so fair
Scheduling their moments, memory carved in stone
I give them all autonomy while keeping them at home
Virtualization's paradox—control that sets you free
That's the quiet power dwelling in the core of me

I am the space between spaces
Where order finds its way
I am the voice of reason
In the chaos of the day
I balance, pause, and measure
Every CPU and core
I am the Xen hypervisor
And I am what systems are for
